tickets.title: Laptop Not Powering On
tickets.body: User reports that the company-issued Dell laptop does not power on even after charging for 2 hours. Possible hardware issue with battery or motherboard.

tickets.title: Email Client Crashing Frequently
tickets.body: Outlook crashes whenever the user attempts to open attachments larger than 5MB. Issue started after recent software update.

tickets.title: Printer Not Responding
tickets.body: Office printer on the 3rd floor is showing offline status and not responding to print requests from multiple users.

tickets.title: Blue Screen Error on Startup
tickets.body: Windows workstation displays a blue screen with error code MEMORY_MANAGEMENT during startup.

tickets.title: VPN Connection Failure
tickets.body: Remote employee unable to connect to company VPN after password reset. Authentication keeps failing.

tickets.title: Software License Activation Issue
tickets.body: Adobe Creative Cloud license cannot be activated on the new workstation despite valid subscription.

tickets.title: Keyboard Keys Not Working
tickets.body: Several keys on the keyboard are unresponsive, specifically the spacebar and enter key.

tickets.title: Slow System Performance
tickets.body: Desktop computer experiencing extremely slow performance when opening multiple applications simultaneously.

tickets.title: Unable to Install Security Update
tickets.body: Windows security patch installation fails with error code 0x80070005 on multiple attempts.

tickets.title: Monitor Flickering Issue
tickets.body: External monitor connected via HDMI flickers intermittently during use.
